description_long: This guard rail consists of two parallel horizontal rails made of black metal tubing, supported by three vertical posts. The posts and rail joints are accented with yellow end caps and collars, which may serve as visual markers or protective covers. The rail is designed to be mounted on a flat surface, with flanged base plates at the bottom of each post for secure attachment. The ends of the rails are capped with yellow, rounded elements, and one end features a distinctive curved handle-like section, possibly for added safety or as a visual cue. The overall construction is robust, with a utilitarian design suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, parking lots, or building perimeters. The finish appears smooth and slightly glossy, with the yellow accents providing high visibility.
description: A black metal guard rail with yellow end caps and collars, featuring two horizontal rails and three vertical posts with flanged bases. One end has a curved handle-like section for added safety or visibility.
description_view_0: The guard rail is seen from the end, highlighting the curved handle-like section and the vertical post with yellow accents.
description_view_1: A side view showing the full length of the two parallel rails, three supporting posts, and yellow end caps and collars.
description_view_2: The opposite end view, focusing on the straight terminal with yellow end cap and the vertical post.
description_view_3: A side view from the opposite direction, displaying the rails, posts, and the curved handle section on the left.
